task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded into the workbook.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data panel on the left side of the screen shows the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset with its columns (e.g., Order Date, Revenue, Product Category) available for use.

task_completion.description: Verify a Stacked Area visualization has been added to the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visualization canvas displays an area chart, and the chart type icon or grammar panel indicates 'Stacked Area' is selected.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Order Date' is on the X-Axis and set to the Quarter time grain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The grammar panel shows 'Order Date' in the X-Axis (or Category) section with a 'Quarter' indicator, and the chart's X-axis labels display quarters (e.g., Q1, Q2).

task_completion.description: Verify 'Revenue' is on the Y-Axis and 'Product Category' is used for Color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The grammar panel shows 'Revenue' in the Y-Axis (or Values) section and 'Product Category' in the Color section. The chart includes a legend listing the product categories.

task_completion.description: Verify the visualization title is set to 'Quarterly Revenue by Product Category'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Quarterly Revenue by Product Category' is clearly visible as the title at the top of the chart visualization.

task_completion.description: Verify the canvas tab is renamed to 'Revenue Trends' and the workbook is named 'Quarterly_Revenue_Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas tab at the bottom or top of the workspace reads 'Revenue Trends'. The application title bar or the save dialog shows the workbook name as 'Quarterly_Revenue_Analysis'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual data visualization software's GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through menus, dragging and dropping fields into the grammar panel, and interacting with the BI tool's interface, rather than using terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is genuinely rendered by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart appears integrated within the application's workspace, surrounded by native UI elements like the data panel, properties panel, and toolbars, rather than being a static image opened in a picture viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a text editor to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (e.g., Notepad, VS Code) open where the agent is manually typing out JSON files, XML, or task parameters to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected workbook filename is 'Quarterly_Revenue_Analysis.dva'. The required chart type is a 'stacked_area' chart. The X-axis must use the 'quarter' time grain. The color category must be 'Product Category'. The canvas tab must be named 'Revenue Trends'.
